accessory.detail: Non-food products (toys, brushes, accessories) are final sale unless there is a quality defect. If you have a quality issue, please bring the item back to the store within 14 days for an exchange.
accessory.note: Return policies may be updated based on actual store policy.

food.summary: Return or exchange within 14 days for quality issues
food.detail: Cat food and supplements may be returned or exchanged within 14 days if there is a quality issue. Please bring the item back to the store.
food.note: Return policies may be updated based on actual store policy.

pet.detail: All pets come with a 14-day health guarantee. If a health concern arises within 14 days of purchase, please book an appointment at your original store and we will assist you.

pet.note: Our delivery staff will call you when they are on the way.
